patches.hypothesis: Refined the patch by removing hardcoded values, adding null checks, and handling edge cases.
patches.changes: + if (locale == null) return false; + if (cAvailableLocaleSet == null) { cAvailableLocaleSet = availableLocaleSet(); } + return cAvailableLocaleSet.contains(locale);
patches.fixed_method: public static boolean isAvailableLocale(Locale locale) { if (locale == null) return false; if (cAvailableLocaleSet == null) { cAvailableLocaleSet = availableLocaleSet(); } return cAvailableLocaleSet.contains(locale); }
patches.diff: + if (locale == null) return false; + if (cAvailableLocaleSet == null) { cAvailableLocaleSet = availableLocaleSet(); } + return cAvailableLocaleSet.contains(locale);

patches.hypothesis: The issue is caused by the cAvailableLocaleSet variable being null, causing a NullPointerException when attempting to call the contains method on it.
